title: 25 Year Carpet Cleaning  - Semi Absentee - Seller Financing
description:
Well-established carpet cleaning company with over 25 years in business, offering a strong, stable foundation for a new owner. This semi-absentee operation features a reliable team already in place, handling day-to-day operations efficiently.

The business boasts a large database of repeat and past customers, along with solid referral relationships that consistently drive revenue. Known for its professional branding, excellent reputation, and strong online presence, the company enjoys steady financial performance and outstanding customer reviews.

Equipped with newer, well-maintained equipment, this turnkey operation offers immediate cash flow with significant upside potential through expanded marketing, service offerings, or territory growth.

Ideal for an owner-operator or investor seeking a dependable service business with long-standing goodwill and growth opportunities.

Serious inquiries only—contact us today to learn more and request additional details on this proven, profitable opportunity.
